description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is an eight-wheeled armored vehicle with a low, angular profile and a digital camouflage paint scheme. The exterior is covered in sloped armor plating, providing protection across the entire body, including the front, sides, and roof. A prominent turret is mounted on the roof, equipped with two visible gun barrels, suggesting a dual-weapon system. The vehicle features reinforced, solid black wheels designed for off-road and urban mobility, and the windows are small and angled for added protection. The overall design emphasizes both defense and offensive capability, with a focus on survivability and firepower in urban environments.
description: An eight-wheeled armored combat vehicle with a digital camouflage pattern, sloped armor, and a roof-mounted dual-barrel turret.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, armored front with sloped plating and minimal window exposure.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the eight large black wheels, angular body, and the prominent roof-mounted turret with dual barrels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor and the compact, angular shape of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the wheels, turret, and digital camouflage pattern.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One roof-mounted turret with two visible gun barrels located centrally on the top of the vehicle.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped, angular armor plating of apparent moderate thickness; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern with green, tan, brown, and gray angular shapes.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large, solid black tires with minimal visible tread, likely all-terrain or off-road type.
